titleStmt.title: SII 5.458: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 458. (A.R. No. 165 of 1894). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE APATSAHAYESVARA SHRINE AT ALANGUDI, PAPANASAM TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmālai miṭain tu poṉmālai tikaḻtarap pāmālai malin=ta parumaṇit tiraḷpuyat tirunilamaṭant Aiyoṭum jeyamaka ḷiruppa kanavarai mārva n=ta ṉatenap peṟṟut tirumaka ḷorutaṉi yiruppak kalaimakaḷ coṟṟiṟam puṇarn=ta kaṟppiṉaḷāki viruppoṭu nāvakat tiruppat ticaitoṟu n=ti kiriyoṭu ceṅkol Īṭappa Akilabhu vanamum kavippator putumatipola veṇkuṭai mīmicai niṟppak karuṅkali yoḷittu vaṉpilattiṭaik kiṭappak kuḷattiṭait teliṅka vimaṉ vilaṅkalmicai yeṟavuṅ kaliṅkapūmiyaik (ka)kaṉai Eri
parukavum Aiympaṭaip paruvattu vempaṭai tāṅki veṅkaimaṇṭalat tāṅ kiṉitirun tu vaṭaticai yaṭippaṭuttaruḷit teṉ ticait tarumamu n=ta vamu n=tā ṉa mu n=ta ḻaippa vetamum meymaiyum Ātiyukampoṟ talaittalai ciṟappa van=ta ruḷi velakkarum poṟpuli yāṇai pārttivar cūṭa niṟaimaṇimakuṭa muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭi maṉnuyirk kellām miṉnuyirt tāypoṟ taṇṇaḷi parappi taṉittaṉi para[ n tu] maṇmuḻutuṅ kaḷippa manuṉeṟi vaḷarttu taṉ koyilk koṟṟavāyiṟpuṟattu maṇinā voṭuṅ
ka muracukaḷ muḻaṅka vijayamum pukaḻum melme loṅka Ūḻiūḻi Immānilaṅ kākkat tirumaṇip poṟṟoṭṭeḻutupattāṇṭu varumuṟai muṉne maṉnavar cumantuḷḷiṟai niraittuc corin=ta cempoṟ kuvaiyāṟ taṉ kulanāyakaṉ tāṇṭavam puriyuñ cempoṉampalañ cūḻ tirumāḷikaiyuṅ kopuravāyiṟ kūṭa cāḷaramum Ulakuvalaṅkoṇṭa voḷiviḷaṅku nemik kulavarai yutayakkuṉṟamoṭu niṉṟenap pacumpoṉmeyntu panivaḷarp pīṭamum vicumpoḷi taḻaippa viḷaṅkupoṉmeyntu Iruni
la n=ta] ḻaippa Imaiyavar kaḷippa periyatirunāḷ perumpeyar viḻavenu muyarpuraṭṭāti yuttiraṭṭātiyi lampalaniṟain=ta vaṟputakkūttar Iṉparvāḻveḻun=ta ruḷutaṟkkut tirutterkkoyil cempoṉ meyntu parutiraḷ muttiṉ payilvaṭam parappi niṟaimaṇi māḷikai neṭun=ti ruviti taṉ tiruvaḷar piyarāṟc ceytu camaittariḷip paiñpoṟk kuḻitta parikala mutalāṟ cempoṟk kaṟppakattoṭu paricciṉnamum Aḷavilātaṉa voḷipeṟa vamaittup pattar māṇpiṟ cittiraittiṅka ḷattam pe
ṟṟa Ātittavārattut tiruvaḷarmatiyiṉ trayodaśi ppakkattu Iṉnan palavu minitu camaittaruḷit taṉ norukuṭai niḻaṟ talamuḻutu n=ta ḻaippac ceḻiyar veñcuram puka ceralar kaṭalpuka Aḻitaru ciṅkaḷa rañci neñcalamara(ra) kaṅkar tiṟaiyiṭak kaṉnaṭar veṉniṭak koṅka rotuṅkak koṅkaṇar cāya maṟṟetticai maṉnaru n=ta ṉtamak karaṇenat tirumalarc cevaṭi yuri- maiyi liṟaiñcat terivaiyar tilata n=ti yākapatākai purikuḻal maṭappiṭi punitakuṇavanitai tribhu vanamuḻutuṭaiyāḷiṉ tiruviḷat tari
ḷmuḻutumuṭaiyāḷena Uṭaniruppa neṭumālakattut tirumakaḷ ḷirunteṉa mātar maṭamayil pūtalat taruntuti Araṇiya kaṟpiṟ taraṇimuḻutumuṭaiyāḷ Ivaṉ tirumaṇimārvat taruḷuṭa niruppac cempoṉ virasiṁ hāsa nattut tiripuvaṉamuḻutumuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟirun=ta riḷiyaRead ºruḷiya.kopparakesaripatma rāṉa tribhu vanacakra varttikaḷ śrīvikra macoḷade var patinoṉṟāvatu nāḷñpattañcināl vikra macoḷapurattuk koyili nuḷḷālai Akaḷaṅkaṉ maṇṭapattup paḷḷikkaṭṭiliṉme leḻun=ta ru
ḷiyiruntu Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyā yāṇṭu pattāvatu nāḷ nūṟṟorupattañcinālum nāḷ muṉnūṟṟorupattumunṟiṉālum perumapaṟṟappuliyūri leḻun=ta ruḷiiruntu keṭṭaruḷi niccayittaruḷinapaṭiye yāḷuṭaiyār nittaṟpaṭi Amutuceytaruḷa mivanukkup ponakappaḻavaricikku veṇṭum ponakappaḻanelluc cuttamalivaḷanāṭṭu muṭiccoḷanāṭṭuc caṉanātaccaruppetimaṅkalam kaṭamaikku Aḷantu mutalāṉa ponakappaḻa nellile yiṭakkaṭavatākavum I
ṉ nellu Ivvūravare Āḷiṭṭu toṟum candrāditya vaṟ Āḷuṭaiyār koyilil poṉmeyn=ta perumāḷ paṇṭārattile ceppukkāl tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyānāle Aḷakkakkaṭavārkaḷākavum Ippaṭi jananātha ccaruppetimaṅkalattu Uṭaiyār tiruvirumpūḷai yuṭaiyār koyilile kalveṭṭa tiruvāymoḻin=ta ruḷināreṉṟu tiruman=ti ra Ōlai nāyakam jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu puliyūrkkoṭṭamāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻavaḷanāṭṭup pe nāṭṭu neṟkuṉṟattu
neṟkuṉṟaṅkiḻāṉ Arayaṉ karuvu muttiṭṭaceyyumpaṭippaṭiyum purovarittiṇaikkaḷaṅ kaṇakkeḻutuvi ṟukkuk ka rājarājappāṇṭināṭṭu rājendra coḻavaḷanāṭṭu teṉpaṟappunāṭṭu mullanalūr kiḻavaṉ veḷān tillaināyakanāna vecālipperayarum Aruḷmoḻitevavaḷanāṭṭu valivalakkūṟṟattu nāvalūruṭaiyāṉ celvaṉ puṟṟiṭaṅkoṇṭānāna vayirākarāyarum puravarittiṇaikkaḷam kaṇakkeḻutuvi[ttāṉ jayaṅ]koṇṭacoḻama
ṇṭalattu maṇaviṟkoṭṭattu maṇavilnāṭṭu comatevaṉ tirumālayaṉtuṟaiyuṭaiyānāna miḻalaiveḷānum centa cinaraṅkoṟṟaṉ Āṭavalāṉ kaṭampanum jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaḻuntūr nāṭṭuk kūṭalū(r)ruṭaiyāṉ veḷāṉ civalokamuṭaiyānāna viracoḻappallavaraiyanum rājarājavaḷanaāṭṭu Emappeṟkkūṟṟattu poykkuṭaiyāṉ tiruvaiyāṟaṉ ponnampalakkūttanāna vikra macoḻaulakaveḷānum purovarittiṇaikka[ḷanāyakam jaya]ṅkoṇṭacoḻa
maṇṭalattu Āmurkkoṭṭattuc ciṟukuṉṟanāṭṭuc ciṟukuṉṟattuc ciṟukuṉṟaṅkiḻān parameśva raṉ kāmanum jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu kuṟumpūrnāṭṭu Arayaṉ ceṅkaranārāyaṇanum Uyyakkoṇṭavaḷanāṭṭu pāmpuranāṭṭuc ciṟukuṭaiyāṉ kumaraviṭaṅka nātittatevanum rājendra coḻavaḷanāṭṭu puṟaṅkarampaināṭṭu Eḻulūruṭaiyāṉ vetavanamuṭaiyānāna neṟiyuṭaiccoḻap pallavaraiyanum mukaveṭṭi jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu koṭṭattu
lnāṭṭup pācālikiḻavaṉ muṭikoṇṭāṉ(ñ) cen=ta konum jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟumpūrnāṭṭu nākamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ veḷāṉ tāmotiranum Arumoḻitevavaḷanāṭṭu neṉmalināṭṭup paḻaiyanūruṭaiyāṉ comatevan Ubha yañceyvānum rājendra coḻavaḷanāṭṭu Ārvalakkūṟṟattup puliyūruṭaiyāṉ peṟṟāṉ mānen tukayyanum Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḻvarippaṭiyum Āḷuṭaiyā(ā)ṟku nāḷoṉṟukku Amutu ka ponakap paḻavarici kalaṉe
tūṇiyāka nāḷ muṉnūṟṟaṟupattañcukku miṟukkum ponakap paḻavarici nānūṟṟeṇpattāṟu kalaṉe Iru tūṇiyum maṟuvāci kalattuk ṇi yoru nāḻi muvuḻakkāka nāḷoṉṟuk karici kuṟuṇi yaññāḻiyum kuttuvāci yarici kalattukku Arici kuṟuṇi yirunāḻi vuḻakke yiru ceviṭāka nāḷoṉṟuk karici kuṟuṇi yaṟunāḻi yuḻak kāḻākke yiruceviṭum Āka nāḷoṉṟukku vāciyāleṟu marici mukkuṟuṇi muṉnāḻi yuḻak kāḻākke yiruceviṭāka nāḷ muṉnūṟṟaṟupattañ
cuk karici nāṉūṟṟu kalane patak korunāḻiyum Āka Arici Ainūṟṟut toṇṇūṟṟuka kalaṉe Irutūṇip patak korunāḻiyināl Iraṭṭi nellu Āyirat torunūṟaṟeṇpattoru kalaṉe Iru tūṇi yirunāḻiyum cuttamalivaḷanāṭṭu muṭiccoḻanāṭṭu jananātaccaruppetimaṅkalattuk kaṭamaik kaḷantu mutalāṉa ponakap paḻanellile Ivvūrvare Āḷiṭṭu Eṭuppittu Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟum ca[ ntrā ti] tya val Uṭaiyār koyililpa poṉmeynda perumāḷ paṇṭārattile ceppukkāl tirucciṟṟampalaḻuṭaiyānāle Aḷakka kaṭavārkaḷākavum Innellukkuc cat
takkūli muṉ celaviṭṭu varumpaṭiyey celaviṭakkaṭavatākavum tiruvāymoḻinda ruḷinamaiyila Ippaṭi tiruvirumpūḷaiyuṭaiya mahāde var koyilile kalveṭṭuvatu Ivai porovari(t)tiṇaikkaḷanāyakam ciṟukuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai porovari tiṇaikkaḷanāyakañ ciṟukuṉṟakiḻāṉ Eḻuttu ....ivai porovari tiṇaikkaḷanāyakam mukan=ta nūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai porovari tiṇaikkaḷanāyakam neṟiyuṭaiccoḻapa pallavaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Itai porovari tiṇaikkaḷattu mukaveṭṭi pācālikiḻavaṉ [eḻuttu .. Ivai nāṅke � I
ḻalai veḷāḷaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai porovari tiṇaikkaḷattu mukaveṭṭi nākamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vayirākarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Uṭaiyār tiricciṟṟampalamuṭaiyark kamutuceytaruḷa ponaka paḻanel leṭukkaveṉṟum Ippaṭi kalveṭṭaveṉṟu prasāda ñceytaruḷina tirumukamum ceyyumpaṭiyum van=ti ṭattu Atikāram perumpāṇṭūrk kumārattabhaṭaṭa num muṭumpaip puṇṭarikākṣabhaṭaṭa num catu cā viruntu peruṅkuṟi koṭṭit taṉmiyeḻuti kūṭṭaṅ kuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyirun tu tirumukappaṭi tuva ceyta tirumu ve
paṇittār periyacāṇattu kuravacerik kovindabhaṭaṭa n paṇiyālum ttu kaḷattūr karuvarai pola niṉṟāṉpaṭṭar paṇiyālum vājasa niyaril cinārattut tāmotirapaṭṭaṉ paṇiyālum kalveṭṭiyatu .... Ippaṭi viṇṇappañceytu tiruvāymoḻi[ nda ruḷi] t tirumukamum ceyyumpaṭiyuṅ koṭuvantu kalveṭṭuvittār Āḷuṭaiyār koyililk kāl ceyyum nāṇampi tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyānāna mpalaṅ koyilkoṇṭāṉ kaṇapatiyāna poṉmāḷikaip piccanum kaṇkāṇi va� ta Iva Ikkoyil
Digital edition of SII 5.458 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
